name: 24"x13" Large Ceramic Table Lamp with Woven Shade Sandstone - Threshold™
description:
Light up your space in textured artisan style with the Large Ceramic Table Lamp with Woven Shade from Threshold™. This table lamp features a drum-shaped woven shade with a pot-like sandstone base for a vintage look. Designed with a two-way light setting, this large table lamp is easy to turn on and off with the socket turn knob rotary switch.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
